parameters.content:
🌩️ DUAL-SOURCE WEATHER MONITOR

This workflow checks TWO independent weather APIs daily:
• Open-Meteo (free, no API key required)
• Google Weather API (requires API key)

Checks run at 23:50 daily for NYC area (40.7128, -74.0060).

⚠️ CONFIGURE: Update Telegram chatId before activating!

📊 API CONDITIONS CHECKED

OPEN-METEO API:
• Weather codes: 96, 99
• These indicate thunderstorm with hail

GOOGLE WEATHER API:
• Conditions: HAIL, HAIL_SHOWERS
• Checks next 6 hours (hours=6 parameter)

🔀 DEDUPLICATION LOGIC

Both IF nodes send TRUE paths to Merge node.
Consolidate & Deduplicate Alerts node:
• Combines multiple sources into ONE alert
• Assigns severity: HIGH if both APIs agree
• Generates intelligent message with source list
• Prevents duplicate notifications

📱 TELEGRAM CONFIGURATION

REQUIRED SETUP STEPS:
1. Create bot via @BotFather
2. Get your chat ID (use @userinfobot)
3. Replace 'TU_CHAT_ID' with actual ID

DYNAMIC MESSAGE TEMPLATE:
Uses consolidated data including severity level, sources list, timestamp, location, and action recommendations.

🗺️ LOCATION CONFIGURATION

Current Location: NYC (40.7128, -74.0060)

To change location, update BOTH APIs:
• Open-Meteo: latitude, longitude parameters
• Google: location.latitude, location.longitude parameters

🚨 ERROR HANDLING

Error Trigger monitors ALL nodes.
If any node fails, sends alert with:
• Failed node name
• Error message
• Execution ID
• Timestamp

⚠️ Separate from main alert flow
